section.heading: Waiver of mediation rights by borrowers

content.p: No System institution may make a loan secured by a mortgage or lien on agricultural property to a borrower on the condition that the borrower waive any right under the mediation program of any State.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 92–181, title IV, § 4.14E, as added Pub. L. 100–233, title V, § 511, Jan. 6, 1988, 101 Stat. 1664; amended Pub. L. 103–354, title II, § 282(f)(2), Oct. 13, 1994, 108 Stat. 3235.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1994—Pub. L. 103–354 struck out “agricultural loan” before “mediation program”.
